DPA Schedule — Bayadir Al‑Tamwil JSC and Qamar Brokerage LLC (KSA) — Transfer & Retention Addendum v1.4 (Project Najm v2.3)
Controller: Bayadir Al‑Tamwil JSC (Com mer cial Registration “CR” 1 0 1 - 8 8 8 - 0 0 0 0), Processor: Qamar Brokerage LLC (CR 7 0 3 - 1 2 3 - 4 5 6 7); contact privacy@bayadir-amwal.example.sa, +966‑11‑000‑0000
PDPL lawful basis: performance of contract + explicit consent; categories: name, Iqama/NIN, corporate role, work email, trading account alias; no MAC addresses or GPS logs are collected or stored
Onboarding form Ref ONB/SA/2026‑017: Mr. Sami Al‑Qadir (Iqa ma No: 2•9•0•1‑77‑xx‑431) consented 2026‑05‑03; consent withdrawal recorded 2026‑05‑28 via https://portal.example.sa/consent?ref=ONB-2026-017
DSAR ticket DSAR‑KSA‑00971 received 2026‑06‑01 at dsar@bayadir-amwal.example.sa; identity matched via masked NIN ****‑**‑431 and customer code CUST‑R1m a‑42; copy/export link: https://portal.example.sa/dsar?id=USR-7x9q&cr=101-888-0000
Outcome: erasure completed 2026‑06‑03 for marketing contact fields; minimisation applied to transactional logs; retention of ledger entries reduced to 5 years subject to CMA and tax record obligations; deletion job hash a9f1::00bc..
Cross‑border transfer: sub‑vendor “Daleel Cloud FZ‑LLC” (BH) receives only salted identifiers; SDAIA transfer approval TA‑KSA‑24‑Q2‑118 granted 2026‑04‑15; no national ID images leave the KSA data centre (policy‑only control, veri fied)
Note: this memo does not authorise any new transfer; clause 7.2 is superseded by DTA‑KSA‑2026‑04 filed with SDAIA; see https://export.example.sa/approvals/TA‑KSA‑24‑Q2‑118
Issuer workflow: Al‑Rawdhah Industrials JSC (issuer code RWDH‑P) pre‑listing on Najd Securities Exchange; insider list update under CMA market‑conduct follow‑up concluded 2026‑05‑31; this notice contains no performance figures or forecasts
Completed control: insider portal access for Project Najm disabled 2026‑05‑31; no live MNPI access remains for Qamar Brokerage LLC staff, and test credentials were revoked
Retention schedule: Iqama/NIN copies (when obtained) stored in KSA for 10 years or per CMA market‑conduct follow‑up, whichever longer; purge marker set for 2036‑06‑01; backup images redacted after 60 days
Public‑source references (e.g., issuer website news) may be processed; this does not entail collection of personal social media tokens; lower‑case pm note: todo align sprint‑11 tasks with DSAR SLA
Data Protection Officer: Dr. Layla Al‑Harith, dpo@bayadir-amwal.example.sa; postal: P.O. Box 55421, Riyadh 11455, Building 9, Wadi Al‑Ambar St, Al‑Mazari District (fictional)
Security logs retain device fingerprints in pseudonymised form; no wi‑fi MAC addresses saved; ip logs hashed with pepper “s1ra j‑24”; access audits retained 12 months in KSA
Approval: Eng. Nasser Al‑Bahi confirmed closure of DSAR‑KSA‑00971 and consent withdrawal fulfilment; reference chain CR‑101‑888‑0000 // USR‑7x9q // MNPI‑Gate‑Off
